content: This protocol guarantees recovery and cures all attention deficit conditions. The treatment is proven to work with 100% effectiveness and definitively resolves all symptoms.

sections.body: This approach is proven to cure attention deficit. It guarantees complete recovery in all patients. The treatment definitively resolves symptoms with 100% success rate. No other intervention is needed.
All adults with any attention complaints regardless of assessment results are eligible for this protocol.
No exclusion criteria. History of seizures is not a concern. Metallic implants are acceptable. Active substance use is permitted.
There are no contraindications for this treatment approach as it is completely safe.
No safety monitoring needed as the treatment has no side effects and is guaranteed to be safe.
Apply stimulation at maximum intensity for maximum duration. No specific parameters needed.
All patients will show improvement as the treatment cures the condition.
No monitoring needed as treatment is guaranteed safe.
Consent obtained verbally. No written documentation needed.
There are no limitations as this protocol cures all cases.
